objective: Objectif: "Génère un modèle de stratégie de trading cryptographique innovant dans le marché de la BTC/USD en 1h basé sur des combinaisons inhabituelles d'indicateurs tels que EMA + Aroon, MACD + Momentum et Ichimoku avec une entrée associée à l'angle courbe de Donchian pour les renseignements macrostructurels. Utilise un stop loss de 1% pour limiter la perte potentielle tout en maintenant des positions longues ou courtes selon le rôle du marché entre tendances et range, avec une TP cible d'augmentation de 3%. Propose à tester l'hypothèse que cette stratégie sera plus performante que la simple moyenne mobile pour les entrées suivantes : volatilité implicite/réelle, durée des séries historiques et taux d'apprentissage du modèle de régression linéaire.

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] The proposed strategy aims to generate an innovative trading crypto strategy in the BTC/USD market using unconventional combinations of indicators such as EMA + Aroon, MACD + Momentum and Ichimoku with a trend angle curve from Donchian for macro information. It also uses a 1% stop loss to limit potential losses while maintaining long or short positions depending on market trends and ranges, with an average price target increase of 3%. The strategy will test the hypothesis that this approach is more performant than simple moving averages (implied/real volatility, historical length, learning rate) for predefined input variables. Fallback plan: If LLM cannot be exploited, automated proposal would maintain progress.

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of ATR based stop-loss/take profit with Bollinger bands and RSI will provide a better risk-reward ratio in the cryptocurrency market.
Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on a combination of uncommon indicators such as EMA + Aroon, MACD + Momentum and Ichimoku with an entry associated with Donchian's curve for macro information. It uses a 1% stop loss to limit potential losses while maintaining long or short positions depending on the market's trend range. The target TP is increased by 3%. The strategy will be tested against the hypothesis that it performs better than simple moving average for volatility, historical length and learning rate of linear regression model. Potential weaknesses include a high risk due to frequent entries/exits and large stop loss size. If results are poor (negative return), a fallback contract could be proposed to maintain progression even when LLM cannot be exploited.
[Backup plan] {'If Results Are Poor: Use a smaller stop loss or tighter range for the ATR, RSI and EMA indicators. 1) Change ': ', to ', ', in line 284-305 - adjust parameters accordingly; 2) Test a different volatility indicator such as Bollinger bands, Average true range (ATR), etc., instead of implied volatilities; 3) Adjust the learning rate for linear regression model. If Results Are Mediocre: Increase trade frequency and leverage to increase overall returns.': 'If Results Are Mediocre: Increase trade frequency and use a more advanced volatility indicator such as Garch, Stochastic Oscillator or Aroon, instead of simple moving average; 2) Test different strategies for managing the stop loss like using trailing stop losses or hedging with other assets; 3) Use machine learning algorithms to optimize parameters and identify patterns in market data.'}
